Describe the sequence of kitchen items appearing on the counter throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 4s, cut pieces of yellow squash rest on a white cutting board near the woman; at 12s, small glass bowls containing ingredients appear on the counter near the sink; at 18s, a baking sheet filled with cubed yellow squash becomes visible on the counter next to the whole squash.

question: Describe the visible text and the woman's gestures as the video progresses.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a title card displays the text 'eHow' on a white sticky note graphic; at 12s, the woman is standing in the kitchen setting gesturing with her hands; at 18s, the woman is gesturing with her palms facing upwards near the refrigerator.
